'''zhayogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadventure|coadventure]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadventure|coadventure]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhayogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæyegeth|zhæyegeth]] || [[word:zhæyegej|zhæyegej]] || [[word:zhæyegesh|zhæyegesh]] || [[word:zhæyege|zhæyege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhayoyogoth|zhayoyogoth]] || [[word:zhayoyogoj|zhayoyogoj]] || [[word:zhayoyogosh|zhayoyogosh]] || [[word:zhayoyogo|zhayoyogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhayogoth|zhayogoth]] || [[word:zhayogoj|zhayogoj]] || [[word:zhayogosh|zhayogosh]] || [[word:zhayogo|zhayogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhayofgoth|zhayofgoth]] || [[word:zhayofgoj|zhayofgoj]] || [[word:zhayofgosh|zhayofgosh]] || [[word:zhayofgof|zhayofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhayogotho|zhayogotho]] || [[word:zhayogojo|zhayogojo]] || [[word:zhayogosho|zhayogosho]] || [[word:zhayogoko|zhayogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhayogoth|zhayogoth]] || [[word:zhayogoj|zhayogoj]] || [[word:zhayogosh|zhayogosh]] || [[word:zhayogo|zhayogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhayogothol|zhayogothol]] || [[word:zhayogojol|zhayogojol]] || [[word:zhayogoshol|zhayogoshol]] || [[word:zhayogokol|zhayogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhayogothotho|zhayogothotho]] || [[word:zhayogojojo|zhayogojojo]] || [[word:zhayogoshosho|zhayogoshosho]] || [[word:zhayogoko|zhayogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhayogothon|zhayogothon]] || [[word:zhayogojon|zhayogojon]] || [[word:zhayogoshon|zhayogoshon]] || [[word:zhayogokon|zhayogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhayogothoro|zhayogothoro]] || [[word:zhayogojoro|zhayogojoro]] || [[word:zhayogoshoro|zhayogoshoro]] || [[word:zhayogokoro|zhayogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
